mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO wrong_questions (user_id, question_id, note) VALUES (#{userId}, #{questionId}, #{note})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wrong_questions WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND question_id=#{questionId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wrong_questions WHERE user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY added_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wrong_questions WHERE user_id=#{userId}
SELECT * FROM wrong_questions WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND question_id=#{questionId}
